heading: Transportation of chemical munitions
label: 1512a Transportation of chemical munitions

children.heading: Prohibition of transportation across State lines
children.label: a Prohibition of transportation across State lines
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may not transport any chemical munition that constitutes part of the chemical weapons stockpile out of the State in which that munition is located on , and, in the case of any such chemical munition not located in a State on , may not transport any such munition into a State.October 5, 1994October 5, 1994

children.heading: Transportation of chemical munitions not in chemical weapons stockpile
children.label: b Transportation of chemical munitions not in chemical weapons stockpile

children.text: is considered by the Secretary of Defense to be necessary; and
can be accomplished while protecting public health and safety.
